ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recharge_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recharge plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the recharge plan (e.g., Rs 98) */,
  "data_benefit" TEXT /* Data benefit of the recharge plan (e.g., 2GB) */,
  "validity" TEXT /* Validity period of the recharge plan (e.g., 28 Days) */,
  "jio_to_jio_calls" TEXT /* Calling benefit for Jio to Jio calls (e.g., Unlimited) */,
  "jio_to_non_jio_calls" TEXT /* Calling benefit for Jio to non-Jio calls (e.g., IUC 6 paise/min) */,
  "sms_benefit" TEXT /* SMS benefit of the recharge plan (e.g., 300) */,
  "price" REAL /* Cost of the recharge plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the recharge plan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the plan is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recharge plan purchased by the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES recharge_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_data" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who used the service */,
  "data_used" REAL /* Amount of data used by the customer */,
  "calls_made" INTEGER /* Number of calls made by the customer */,
  "sms_sent" INTEGER /* Number of SMS sent by the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the usage was recorded */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recharge plan associated with the usage */,
  "is_overage" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the usage is over the plan limit */,
  "overage_charge" REAL /* Additional charge for overage usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_data_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES recharge_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recharge plan purchased */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES recharge_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateway ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment gateway was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment gateway details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer support, sales, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
